name: simpeg_getter
description: Application to retrieve your data from Simpeg (and also data of other employees) through the API provided by the Simpeg developers. This is not hacking, it simply demonstrates a serious security vulnerability in the ***peg application. This App will continue to work unless the ***peg developers change the API, which I hope they do. This issue highlights a concerning fact that our data has potentially been accessible to other users for years, and it may already have been exposed without our knowledge.
author: Muh. Taufiq Mukhtar (Super Junior Developer 😂)
